local function B(B)return I[B+(761665-741661)]end do local B=I local Z=table.insert local y=string.len local T=table.concat local m=math.floor local r=string.char local S=string.sub local z=type local return(function(I,y,T,m,r,S,z,d,R,e,Z,o,p,A,w,x,Q,l,U,g,C,X)X,d,C,p,e,g,x,Z,A,w,U,o,Q,R,l=function(I,B)local y=g(B)local T=function(...)return Z(I,{...},B,y)end return T end,function(I,B)local
